series_metadata.series_description: This records series includes On-site Review Files which contains the date of on-site reviews, conducted in schools and districts, draft and final review reports, correspondence regarding the review, and clearance letters.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: five (5) years grant closure; provided records have been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: five (5) years grant closure; provided records have been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
